I

initialize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.EndController
Initializes the end screen view automatically upon FXML loading.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameController
Initializes the controller automatically upon FXML loading.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MenuController
Initializes the controller automatically upon loading the FXML view.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.PlacementController
Initializes the placement view.
InvalidCoordinateException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exceptions
Exception thrown when an invalid grid coordinate is accessed or targeted.
InvalidCoordinateException(String, int, int) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidCoordinateException
Constructs a new InvalidCoordinateException with a detailed message and the problematic coordinate values.
InvalidShipSizeException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exceptions
Exception thrown when a ship's expected size does not match the actual number of grid cells provided.
InvalidShipSizeException(String, int, int) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidShipSizeException
Constructs a new InvalidShipSizeException with a descriptive error message, the expected ship size, and the actual cell count received.
IPlayer - Interface in com.example.battleship.model.players
Defines the core operations and behaviors required for a Battleship player.
isFleetComplete() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.HumanPlayer
Checks whether the human player has placed the complete standard fleet.
isFleetDefeated() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Checks if all ships in the board's fleet have been completely sunk.
isFleetSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet
Checks if every ship in the fleet has been completely destroyed.
IShootingStrategy - Interface in com.example.battleship.model
Strategy interface defining targeting algorithms for AI players in Battleship.
isHumanTurn() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Checks if it is currently the human player's turn.
isSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Checks whether the ship has been completely sunk.
